definitions.text: A concave vessel for drinking, usually made of opaque material (as opposed to a glass) and with a handle.
examples: Pour the tea into the cup.
I drank two cups of water but still felt thirsty.

definitions.text: To form into the shape of a cup, particularly of the hands.
examples: Cup your hands and I'll pour some rice into them.

definitions.text: To hold something in cupped hands.
examples: He cupped the ball carefully in his hands.

definitions.text: To pour (a liquid, drink, etc.) into a cup.
examples: We are cupping some new brands of coffee today.
